title: carlowrightia purpurea
intro: Carlowrightia purpurea, also known as Purple Sage, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat digestive issues and sore throats. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Carlowrightia purpurea may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate respiratory issues.
